hero.headline: Your Life, Curated
hero.description: From private dining to exclusive events and seamless transfers — we handle every detail so you never have to. Discreet, refined, always available.

cards.title: Fine Dining
cards.description: From Michelin-starred restaurants to private dining experiences — moments crafted for taste, atmosphere, and unforgettable occasions.

cards.title: Bespoke Travel
cards.description: Private jets and secluded villas define journeys designed entirely around your lifestyle. Thoughtfully curated and flawlessly executed with meticulous attention to detail.

cards.title: Exclusive Access
cards.description: Sold-out events and invitation-only experiences are made effortlessly accessible — where exclusivity becomes your advantage.

dining.title: Chef at Home
dining.description: Fine dining prepared in your residence.

travel.title: Weekend in Amalfi
travel.description: Curated coastal escapes with every detail managed.

wellness.title: Luxury Spa Retreat
wellness.description: A sanctuary of calm reserved privately for you.

wellness.title: Personal Performance Coaching
wellness.description: Elite wellness experts tailored to your lifestyle.

items.quote: One call, and everything was arranged — a private rooftop dinner above the Casablanca skyline with a curated menu and flawless service.
items.name: Karim El Fassi

items.quote: From a last-minute private jet to a villa in Marrakech stocked to our exact taste — all arranged in under four hours.
items.name: Sophia Renard

items.quote: They secured access to an invitation-only dinner I had been told was fully closed.
items.name: Marcus Al-Rashid

about.description1: Since 2011, Lumière Privée has been the silent force behind the most memorable moments in its client's lives. We are not a service — we are a standard. One built on trust, absolute discretion, and an uncompromising dedication to the extraordinary.
about.description2: Based in Casablanca and connected across the world, our team of twelve dedicated concierges operates around the clock so that every request — however quiet, however complex — is met with the same calm precision.

contact.subtitle: Tell us what you envision — we’ll take care of the rest, seamlessly and discreetly.

footer.description: We provide discreet, high-end concierge services designed to simplify your life and elevate your experiences — from private dining and bespoke travel to exclusive access and 24/7 assistance.
